title: chenopodium ficifolium subsp. blomianum
intro: Chenopodium ficifolium subsp. blomianum, also known as Blom's leafy goosefoot, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and flatulence. The health benefits of Chenopodium ficifolium subsp. blomianum include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to support digestive health and alleviate various gastrointestinal issues.
